  "ocr": "J.R. GEIGY, Soc. An.\n\nBASLE, SWITZERLAND\nEstablished A. D. 1764\n\nBranches at\nMaromme, nr. Rouen\n& Huningue (Alsace)\n\nBranch at\nNew York\n\nEnglish Branch Works: The Clayton Aniline Company Ltd, Clayton, Manchester\n\nManufacturers\nof\nANILINE COLOURS FOR ALL TRADES\nSUMAC- and GALL-EXTRACTS, TANNATE for LEATHER\nTANNIC and PYROGALLIC ACIDS\n\nConcessionaires in Great Britain:\nThe Geigy Colour Company, Ltd.,\n35/37, Dickinson Street, Manchester.\nMessrs. C. Roberts & Co., Ltd.,\n4, Vincent Street, Bradford.\nMessrs. A. & M. Zimmermann Ltd.,\n3, Lloyds Avenue, London, E.C.3.\n\nMessrs. Hy. Every & Co.,\n183, Rutherglen Road, Glasgow.\n\nMessrs. E. H. Butler & Son,\n93, Humberstone Gate, Leicester.\n\nBUSINESS MEN!\n\nThe Premier\nRendez-vous\nof\nbusiness men\n\nWHEN IN BASEL\nLUNCH\nAT THE\nTERRASSE-RESTAURANT\nKUNSTHALLE\n\nEmil Birkhäuser & Co., Basle\nAll kinds of High-class Printing for\nCommercial and Industrial Purposes\nPrinters\nPublishers\n\nASK FOR THE\nTRADE INDEX\nOF THE\nBRITISH CHAMBER OF COMMERCE FOR\nSWITZERLAND\n\nTHE BRITISH CHAMBER OF COMMERCE FOR SWITZERLAND\noffers the following services:\nArbitration Facilities.\nNames of Representatives.\nCustoms Requirements.\nSteamship Reservations.\nIncome Tax Information.\nTrade Mark Registration.\nMembership lists by trades.\nCopyright Procedure.\nRailway Rates & Bookings.\nMail and Cable Headquarters.\nHotel Accommodations.\nTrade Opportunities.\nIntroductions Abroad.\nBusiness Introductions.\nPassport & Visa Assistance.\nGovernment Regulations.\nTariff & Licence Rulings.\nIncorporation Problems.\nTrade Paper Library.\nBritish and Swiss Directories.\n\nCODES USED:\nMarconi's, A.B.C. 5th Edition, A.B.C. 6th Edition, Bentley's."
